underlying_goal: Create a small script to import SQL files using fzf for file and database selection in MariaDB
friction_detail: Assistant added spinner/progress indicator when user only wanted to know if mariadb had a native flag; file filter failed to include .gz files without .sql prefix
brief_summary: User wanted a fzf-based script to import SQL/.gz files into MariaDB databases, got a working script after fixing file filter and ordering issues.
